title: Crafty Products 2 x Replacement Hook Pads for Detail Sanders, with 3mm Foam Backing, Self Adhesive
features: Quickly and easily refurbish your detail sander
Simply follow the photos in our listing
description: Premium quality hook pads with shock absorbing 3mm foam backing. Not to be confused with cheaper hook pads without the foam backing. 2 x Replacement hook pad with 3mm foam backing, self-adhesive, for detail sanders, palm sanders and mouse sanders. The hook material is very strong and will hold all appropriately shaped sanding sheets very effectively. The extra strong adhesive backing ensures an excellent bond to the base of your sanding device. The hook material is not Velcro but it is extremely high quality and will provide an excellent and convenient means of fixing sanding sheets to your device. Our hook pads are designed to fit a wide range of detail sanders and you will need to cut the pad to the same shape as your original pad. Simply follow the photos on this listing and within a few minutes your detail sander will be better than new!! We recommend cutting the outside profile using sharp scissors and the vent holes using a sharp Stanley knife, craft knife or scalpel. Please use extreme caution when using knives and cutting tools. The 3mm foam backing on our hook pads provides a degree of shock absorption and reduces vibration, resulting in added comfort for those long sanding jobs. The added flexibility helps enormously when sanding intricate shapes and results in less wear of the hook pad compared to versions without foam backing. Dimensions: length 150mm X width 100mm
